column1: # doctrine_check.sh manifest — parity-locked CANONICAL:<TAG> blocks that must
# stay byte-identical across every carrier file listed for that tag.
# Append new tags/carriers as new lines; comments (#) and blank lines are
# ignored. A tag needs at least 2 carrier lines to be checkable.
# (non-identical — appends a config-blast-radius sentence) variant of the
# Scientific Trial Protocol paragraph. Intentionally NOT a registered carrier
# below — omission is by design, not an oversight.
